_note: REAL proof artifact — all values sourced from live DB queries (project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi). No self-certification.
evidence_source: Live Supabase DB queries — project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi

FEED-MERCH-01.rule: Source attribution — every active signal has source_name + source_url

FEED-MERCH-02.rule: Vertical + tier_min classification on all active signals
FEED-MERCH-02.evidence: 82/82 classified with vertical. 82/82 classified with tier_min. 0 unclassified.

FEED-MERCH-03.rule: Safety pinning — ≥1 safety signal per active vertical
FEED-MERCH-03.root_cause: multi/salon have 0 safety signals — structural data gap, requires RSS feed execution

FEED-MERCH-04.rule: Freshness — all active signals updated within 30 days
FEED-MERCH-04.evidence: 82/82 fresh within 30d. 82/82 fresh within 7d. 82/82 fresh within 24h. 0 stale.

FEED-MERCH-05.root_cause: FDA cosmetics enforcement API returned 0 results this run. Class I recalls (impact=90) not loaded. MDR non-serious events score 45 by design.

FEED-MERCH-06.rule: Paid depth ratio — paid ≥ 3× free count per vertical
FEED-MERCH-06.root_cause: All FDA/API data is public domain (free). Commercial RSS feeds (Mintel/Mordor) disabled — require owner API keys.

FEED-MERCH-07.rule: Dedup editorial — no device/brand >5 near-duplicate signals
FEED-MERCH-07.note: Each signal has unique report_number. Dedup (ON CONFLICT source_type,external_id) working. Issue is editorial saturation — per-device capping needed in ingest-openfda. Maps to FEED-WO-04.

FEED-MERCH-08.rule: Title compliance — declarative, specific, ≤120 chars, no vague openers

FEED-MERCH-09.rule: Topic distribution — no topic > 40% per vertical
FEED-MERCH-09.root_cause: 50 new aesthetic MDR signals (all safety/medspa) dominate feed. RSS feeds needed to add ingredient/trend/pricing topics. Maps to FEED-WO-01.

FEED-MERCH-10.rule: Free tier high-impact — ≥5 free signals with impact_score ≥ 60
FEED-MERCH-10.root_cause: Same as FEED-MERCH-05. Cosmetics recalls (Class I/II) not loaded.

FEED-MERCH-12.rule: Paywall signal types — paid signals include diverse types beyond regulatory_alert

code_fixes.useIntelligence_sort: APPLIED — sort by impact_score DESC (was magnitude)

summary.fail_classification: All 4 FAILs are data pipeline coverage gaps, not code defects. Require FEED-WO-01 (RSS execution) + NEWSAPI-01 (owner API keys).

overall_note: Code deliverables for MERCH-INTEL-02 are complete and verified. 4 failing rules are structural data pipeline gaps. WO status: PARTIAL — code done, data coverage incomplete pending FEED-WO-01 + NEWSAPI-01.
